db_password.description: PostgreSQL password for the documenso database user

secret_key.description: NextAuth secret — random 32+ char string (openssl rand -hex 32)

encryption_key.description: AES encryption key for document data — must be exactly 32 chars

encryption_key_secondary.description: Secondary encryption key for key rotation (optional, defaults to encryption_key)

smtp_port.description: SMTP port (587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SSL, 25 for plain)

smtp_pass.description: SMTP authentication password or app password

smtp_from.description: From address for outgoing emails (e.g. sign@kunde.irongeeks.eu)

smtp_secure.description: Use SSL/TLS (true for port 465, false for STARTTLS on 587)

documenso_port.description: Host port to bind Documenso to (only needed without Traefik)

oidc_well_known.description: Authentik OIDC well-known URL (optional, for SSO)

oidc_client_id.description: OIDC client ID from Authentik application

oidc_client_secret.description: OIDC client secret from Authentik application
